title: MMO Agent Graph
description: Dependency graph artifact produced by the agent REPL harness (tools/agent/).

nodes.description: Graph nodes, sorted by (kind, id). Each node represents a file or canonical ID.

id.description: POSIX-relative path from repo root, or a canonical ID string.

edges.description: Directed dependency edges, sorted by (kind, src, dst, evidence).

dst.description: Destination node id (file path, dotted module name, canonical ID, or $ref string).

evidence.description: Human-readable evidence string for the edge (e.g. dotted module name, $ref value, ID snippet).

kind.description: Edge kind: py_import=absolute Python import; py_import_file=resolved file path; py_import_relative=relative Python import; schema_ref=JSON $ref; id_ref=MMO canonical ID reference.

source_file.description: POSIX-relative path of the file that produced this edge.

warnings.description: Human-readable warnings emitted during graph build (e.g. budget hits, parse errors).

meta.description: Optional metadata injected by diff/seed-first build modes.
